title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Maulana Azad National Urdu University Act, 1996. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 9th January, 1998, vide notification No. S.O 1(E), dated 1st January, 1998, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
